payload.answer: I could not remember takeaways from the article because the provided URL could not be fetched and no article content was available. No durable memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL fetch failed with a 404/network error, so no article content was available to extract durable source takeaways.

details: Reason for remembering: useful for memory architecture
No source claims were extracted or stored.

repair_options: Provide a working URL to the article.
Retry fetching the URL later if the network error was temporary.
